insights.title: Builder Theme: The Agentic Economy: How AI Agents Will Transform the Financial System with Circle Co-Founder and CEO Jeremy Allaire
insights.summary: No Priors 播客 围绕「Builder Theme: The Agentic Economy: How AI Agents Will Transform the Financial System with Circle Co-Founder and CEO Jeremy Allaire」展开长谈，核心信号是 Speaker 1 | 00:05 - 00:19 Today I know Priors, have Jeremy Allaire, the co founder and CEO of Circle. We'll be talking about cryptocurrency, AI, agentic payments, AI evolving on t...。对 builder 来说，重要的不是逐段复述，而是识别哪些能力已经足以重写现有协作流程。
insights.take: 长对话最适合提炼成产品判断和执行清单。优先记录其中反复出现的约束、能力边界和组织变化，再决定哪些值得在本周实验。

insights.title: Builder Theme: Thariq on there's a turbotax connector in Claude Code now, so glad I procrastin...
insights.summary: 社区讨论聚焦于 Thariq 在 X 上的讨论 的最新信号：there's a turbotax connector in Claude Code now, so glad I procrastinated on taxes 😭。这类一线表达更适合拿来判断 builder 叙事是否正在从概念走向可执行工作流。
insights.take: 把高信号推文当作需求和分发雷达，而不是结论本身。真正要落地的是：这背后暴露了哪些 API、工作流、部署和商业模式会率先被重写。
